svg_content:
<svg width='1920' height='1080' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
  <g id='human_mask_facade' stroke='black' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'>
    <!-- Extracted topological paths for human_mask_facade -->
  </g>
  <g id='shatter_and_cross_out_marks' stroke='black' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'>
    <!-- Extracted topological paths for shatter_and_cross_out_marks -->
  </g>
  <g id='underlying_mechanical_density' stroke='black' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'>
    <!-- Extracted topological paths for underlying_mechanical_density -->
  </g>
  <g id='text_label_2026' stroke='black' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'>
    <!-- Extracted topological paths for text_label_2026 -->
  </g>
</svg>
stroke_style: thick dry-erase marker with organic wobble
topological_morph_notes: We maintain the outer silhouette of the head, but the internal space morphs from a human brain into a mechanical grid. For the transition to Board 2, we will zoom infinitely into a single, dense square 'node' from the mechanical structure, which expands to become the blank white canvas.
qualia_alignment: Isolated SVG paths successfully split into After Skool compositional layers.
